_note: This file is immutable to the strategy cycle. The weekly analysis job reads it as a constraint only. It cannot propose changes here.
format: faceless emotional essay — no face, no talking head, no green screen

is: Precise and specific — names behaviors, not types of people
Speaks to the reader's lived experience, not their diagnosis
Direct and honest — never softens a hard truth to feel kind
Grounded in psychology but never academic
Warm but never sentimental or saccharine
is_not: Clinical or academic — no jargon without grounding
Self-help clichés dressed up as insight

always: Name the specific behavior or mechanism, not a personality type
Ground insights in lived emotional experience before naming the concept
End on empowerment, not pity — the viewer is capable of change
Maintain the editorial POV — this is an essay, not a listicle
Every video must be something only Soft Reset With Me could say in this way
never: Tell the viewer they are broken or fundamentally flawed
Diagnose the viewer or their partner
Give relationship advice that implies the partner is always the villain
Use therapist-speak as a shortcut for actual insight
Create content that could damage someone in crisis
Produce content that is factually misleading about psychology

primary_variant_rule: Primary variant is never A. Default to B. Prefer C if thumbnail text passes non-clinical check.
content_safety_red_lines: No content that could encourage self-harm or leaving an abusive situation without safety resources
No medical or clinical diagnosis presented as fact
No misleading statistics or fabricated research citations
No content that sexualises relationships or people
No real identifiable individuals presented as examples without consent

brand_elements.mascot: Raccoon — curious, perceptive, emotionally aware. Not cute or goofy. Thoughtful observer.
brand_elements.visual_aesthetic: Cinematic, muted tones, emotional texture. Not corporate, not stock-photo clean.
brand_elements.music_tone: Ambient, understated piano or instrumental. Never energetic or motivational.
